patient_summary: Patient Olivia, female, age 73 (DOB documented as 05/05/1952 in multiple records). Primary documented problems include hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus and mixed dyslipidemia; additional diagnoses recorded include essential hypertension, postoperative anemia, and leg pain. Major procedure recorded: COLONOSCOPY,WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Notable laboratory abnormalities from 07/03/2023: Iron 41(L), IronSaturation 15(L), Triglycerides 158(H), VLDLCholesterolCal 32(H), Chloride 108(H), AnionGap 5.0(L), eGFRCKD-EPI 58(L). Medication-related notes include an Atorvastatin refill request and a recorded patient statement: "Patientwishestogetoffinsulin." Multiple care team members documented across records, including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP). Conflicting demographic and social-history entries (DOB, smoking history, legal sex/gender) are preserved in conflicts.
